title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Power Grid Corporation - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Power Grid Corporation - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Power Grid Corporation is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Power Grid Corporation:
Power Grid Corporation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Power Grid Corporation!
